user.description: For firmware version 7.0 and later, enter the Enphase cloud credentials, for older models, enter username `installer` without a password.

data.use_manual_token: I want to enter the Envoy access token manually

data_description.host: The hostname or IP address of your Enphase Envoy gateway.
data_description.token: Go to the [Enphase login]({enphase_url}) to get a new token. Current token lifetime: {token_life} days.
data_description.use_manual_token: Check or uncheck this option and select **Submit** if you want to enable or disable entering a token manually. If your Enphase Cloud account has multi-factor authentication enabled, use this to add or update your token.

abort.single_instance_allowed: Service is already configured. Only a single configuration possible.
abort.unique_id_mismatch: The serial number of the device does not match the previous serial number

unexpected_device.message: Unexpected Envoy serial-number found at {host}; expected {expected_serial}, found {actual_serial}

envoy_error.message: Error communicating with Envoy API on {host}: {args}

not_acknowledged.message: Risk of using service: {args}, is not acknowledged

endpoint.name: Endpoint
endpoint.description: Envoy Endpoint to read data from, starts with /.

from_cache.name: From cache
from_cache.description: Read data from local cache to avoid repeated endpoint queries for same endpoint. If data is not in cache, it will be read from Envoy and stored in the cache. Make sure to set this flag to False once in a while to force cache update for this endpoint.

endpoint.name: Endpoint
endpoint.description: Envoy Endpoint to send data to, starts with /.

data.name: Data
data.description: JSON Data to send to Envoy.

method.name: Send method
method.description: Select send method to use: PUT, POST or DELETE.

risk_acknowledged.name: Risk acknowledgement
risk_acknowledged.description: I acknowledge and accept the risk sending (incorrectly formatted) data to the envoy may impact its proper operation.

test_mode.name: Test mode
test_mode.description: When test mode is set, data is not actually send to the envoy. Parameters are validated and the passed data is returned as dict.
